title: Oil price: WTI, Brent surge — Brent crosses $100 to $101.91, Iran ceasefire extension clouds outlook
snippet: Brent crude rose more than 3% to close at $101.91 per barrel, crossing the $100 threshold again. WTI advanced more than 3% to settle at $92.96. IRGC ship seizures and ongoing Hormuz uncertainty drove the surge. 6th consecutive day of major price swings.
tag_reason: Brent $100 재돌파는 금일 발생한 신규 유가 이벤트.
